name: Bangkok Land Public Company Limited
summary: Bangkok Land Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate development, exhibition and convention, food and beverage, and hotel investment businesses in Thailand. It also provides financing services; project and infrastructure management services; building management and maintenance services; and real estate investment trust management services, as well as rents properties. In addition, the company is involved in the retail business, as well as in the issuance of bonds. Bangkok Land Public Company Limited is based in Nonthaburi, Thailand.
